description:
**Milestone:** File Editor UI (Nice-to-Have)

Add the /api/git/details route (per-file last commit info) needed by the file tree git decorations. Scaffold the FileEditorView route at apps/ui/src/routes/file-editor.tsx (TanStack Router). Create apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/ directory with: file-editor-view.tsx (main container with resizable panel layout), file-tree.tsx (recursive file tree using /api/fs/browse-project-files, git status colors from /api/git/enhanced-status), use-file-editor-store.ts (Zustand store for open tabs, active tab, tree state). Add worktree-directory-dropdown.tsx for scoping the browser to main repo or a worktree. Wire into navigation.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/routes/git/routes/details.ts
- apps/ui/src/routes/file-editor.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/file-editor-view.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/file-tree.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/use-file-editor-store.ts
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/worktree-directory-dropdown.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] /file-editor route renders without errors
- [ ] File tree loads project files using browse-project-files API
- [ ] Git status colors render on modified/added/deleted files
- [ ] Worktree dropdown scopes the tree to selected worktree
- [ ] Zustand store persists open tabs across navigation
- [ ] npm run build passes

**Complexity:** large
title: File Tree + /api/git/details Route + FileEditorView Scaffold
